zh.lifeSummary: 當John Offley於大約1450年出生時，他的父親Richard Offley27歲，母親Lady Jane Chester26歲。他和Margery Scott至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1560年在英國賀特福爾享年111歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Offley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Offley (Hertfordshire), Bishops Offley (Staffordshire), or High Offley (Staffordshire). The placenames derive from the Old English personal name Offa + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When John Offley was born about 1450, his father, Richard Offley, was 27 and his mother, Lady Jane Chester, was 26. He had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with Margery Scott. He died in 1560, in Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 111, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Stafford, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Offleyが約1450年に生まれた時，父Richard Offleyは27歳，母Lady Jane Chesterは26歳であった。彼はMargery Scottとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1560年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで111歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary's Church, Stafford, Staffordshir: 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Offley(이)가 대략 1450년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Offley(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane Chester(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Margery Scott(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1560년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 111세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드 스트 마이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.
